Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I was wondering what ramen tastes like when you skip class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It's surprisingly good... You could've invited me at least once, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Why do you have to be like that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Always going off without saying a word.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Put yourself in my shoes, for a change...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...You think it's the other way around?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I was the one always running off on my own. I was too obsessed with getting stronger...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Ever since I lost Miki, that's all I've cared about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I thought if I was strong enough, I could protect anyone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But I was wrong... And now you're gone, too. God, it's like the world is laughing at me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I knew what we were getting into... I knew we were putting our lives on the line![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But I was so focused on fighting that I didn't see anything else![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It doesn't matter how strong I was! Look what happened![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Crying won't change anything, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I don't need you to tell me that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}In the end, I can't run away from who I am.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resolution in Sanada's heart has awakened a new Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Polydeuces{f 0 1 27}, has given rise to {f 0 1 35}Caesar{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Rest easy, Shinji. You just watch from there with Miki.[n]{f 1 1}
